items.headline: BAL 2026 - BAL Daily Episode 10
items.description: BAL is back and has touched down in Rabat, Morocco for the Sahara Conference! 6 teams will go head-to-head to see who can take those last 4 playoff spots. Get an inside look at media day, where players tell us basketball phrases in their native languages. The Sarah Conference is locked and loaded. [BAL Daily Watermark]

items.headline: BAL 2026 - Al Ahly (Egypt) - Team Presentation
items.description: Al Ahly, the most prestigious club in Africa, look to be the first team to raise the BAL Trophy twice. The standard-setting club look to bring home their second championship after winning it all in 2023. Al Ahly rebuilt their roster after a disappointing finish in 2024, bringing new hope to the team. With their new squad, can they lead Egypt to the top again?
